framer.title: Foundation Layout
framer.scenario: A crew is marking stud locations on the bottom plate before assembling the wall frame.

samplePhrase.en: Mark the studs 16 inches on center.
samplePhrase.es: Marca los montantes a 16 pulgadas al centro.

framer.title: Blueprint Reading Basics
framer.scenario: A framing crew reviews a blueprint to understand the wall configuration before cutting lumber.

samplePhrase.en: Check the blueprint for the window opening size.
samplePhrase.es: Revisa el plano para el tamaño de la abertura de la ventana.

framer.title: Cutting Studs to Length
framer.scenario: Workers are cutting studs to the correct length for an 8-foot wall, accounting for plate thickness.

samplePhrase.en: Cut the studs at 7 feet 9 inches for the wall height.
samplePhrase.es: Corta los montantes a 7 pies 9 pulgadas para la altura de la pared.

framer.title: Assembling the Wall Frame
framer.scenario: A crew is laying out studs between top and bottom plates on the ground before standing the wall.

samplePhrase.en: Lay the plates flat and insert the studs.
samplePhrase.es: Coloca las soleras planas e inserta los montantes.

framer.title: Fastening with Nails
framer.scenario: Workers are nailing studs to plates using a pneumatic nail gun on the wall frame assembly.

samplePhrase.en: Drive two nails through each stud into the plate.
samplePhrase.es: Clava dos clavos a través de cada montante en la solera.

framer.title: Headers for Openings
framer.scenario: A crew is building a header for a window opening to support the load above.

samplePhrase.en: Build the header with double 2x10s for the window.
samplePhrase.es: Construye el dintel con doble 2x10 para la ventana.

framer.title: Wall Bracing and Sheathing
framer.scenario: Workers are installing diagonal bracing and plywood sheathing on the wall frame for structural stability.

samplePhrase.en: Install let-in bracing at the corners for strength.
samplePhrase.es: Instala arriostramiento embutido en las esquinas para resistencia.

framer.title: Raising the Wall
framer.scenario: A crew prepares to lift the completed wall frame and set it on the foundation.

samplePhrase.en: Raise the wall and brace it plumb before nailing.
samplePhrase.es: Levanta la pared y arriósrala aplomada antes de clavar.

framer.title: Floor Joist Layout
framer.scenario: A crew is marking joist locations on the band board before installing floor joists.

samplePhrase.en: Mark the joists 24 inches on center across the beam.
samplePhrase.es: Marca las viguetas a 24 pulgadas al centro en toda la viga.

framer.title: Installing Floor Joists
framer.scenario: Workers are placing floor joists into hangers and securing them with fasteners.

samplePhrase.en: Seat each joist in the hanger and nail securely.
samplePhrase.es: Asienta cada vigueta en el soporte y clávala firmemente.

framer.title: Floor Sheathing
framer.scenario: A crew is installing plywood subfloor over the joists, staggering the seams.

samplePhrase.en: Stagger the plywood seams and nail 8 inches on center.
samplePhrase.es: Escalona las juntas de contrachapado y clava cada 8 pulgadas al centro.

framer.title: Roof Rafter Layout
framer.scenario: A crew is laying out rafter positions on the top plate, planning for roof slope.

samplePhrase.en: Lay out the rafters 16 inches on center with a 6:12 pitch.
samplePhrase.es: Distribuye las vigas a 16 pulgadas al centro con pendiente de 6:12.

framer.title: Installing Roof Rafters
framer.scenario: Workers are cutting and installing rafters, securing them to the top plate and ridge board.

samplePhrase.en: Install the rafter pair with bird's mouth cut on the plate.
samplePhrase.es: Instala la pareja de vigas con corte en ángulo en la solera.

framer.title: Roof Sheathing
framer.scenario: A crew is installing plywood roof sheathing over the rafter frame, starting from the bottom.

samplePhrase.en: Install roof sheathing with nails 6 inches on center.
samplePhrase.es: Instala el revestimiento de techo con clavos cada 6 pulgadas al centro.

framer.title: Roof Truss Assembly
framer.scenario: A crew is unloading pre-built roof trusses and preparing to install them on the walls.

samplePhrase.en: Install the roof truss with hurricane ties every 24 inches.
samplePhrase.es: Instala la armadura de techo con amarres de huracán cada 24 pulgadas.

framer.title: Reading Stud Spacing
framer.scenario: A framer must interpret blueprint markings for stud placement and spacing intervals.

samplePhrase.en: The studs are spaced sixteen inches on center according to the blueprint.
samplePhrase.es: Los postes están espaciados dieciséis pulgadas al centro según el plano.

framer.title: Laying Out Wall Plates
framer.scenario: A framer marks stud positions on the top and bottom plates before assembly.

samplePhrase.en: Snap a chalk line and transfer the marks to both plates.
samplePhrase.es: Tira una línea de tiza y transfiere las marcas a ambas soleras.

framer.title: Cutting and Installing Studs
framer.scenario: A framer cuts studs to length and installs them between the top and bottom plates.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the stud is plumb before you drive the nails.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que el poste está aplomado antes de clavar.

framer.title: Installing Headers
framer.scenario: A framer builds and installs headers above door and window openings.

samplePhrase.en: Install the header between the king studs with proper support.
samplePhrase.es: Instala el dintel entre los postes rey con apoyo adecuado.

framer.title: Framing Interior Walls
framer.scenario: A framer constructs an interior partition wall that does not support a load.

samplePhrase.en: This interior wall is non-load-bearing, so we use a single top plate.
samplePhrase.es: Esta pared interior no carga peso, así que usamos una solera superior simple.

framer.title: Reading Floor System Blueprints
framer.scenario: A framer interprets floor system details including joist spacing and cantilevers.

samplePhrase.en: The floor joists span sixteen feet between the beams.
samplePhrase.es: Las vigas de piso tienen un claro de dieciséis pies entre las vigas.

framer.title: Installing Floor Joists
framer.scenario: A framer positions and secures floor joists at the correct spacing and height.

samplePhrase.en: Check the crown of each joist and install with the high side up.
samplePhrase.es: Revisa la corona de cada viga e instala con el lado alto hacia arriba.

framer.title: Installing Floor Sheathing
framer.scenario: A framer lays and fastens plywood or OSB subfloor over the floor joists.

samplePhrase.en: Stagger the seams and fasten the plywood every six inches along the joists.
samplePhrase.es: Alterna las juntas y asegura la madera contrachapada cada seis pulgadas sobre las vigas.

framer.title: Reading Roof Framing Plans
framer.scenario: A framer studies roof plans to understand rafter layout, slopes, and connections.

samplePhrase.en: The roof pitch is six over twelve, so set the angle accordingly.
samplePhrase.es: La inclinación del techo es seis sobre doce, así que ajusta el ángulo en consecuencia.

framer.title: Cutting and Installing Rafters
framer.scenario: A framer cuts rafters using a miter saw and fastens them to the top plates and ridge.

samplePhrase.en: Cut all rafters to length and test fit before installing on the roof.
samplePhrase.es: Corta todas las vigas a la medida y pruébalas antes de instalarlas en el techo.

framer.title: Assembling Roof Trusses
framer.scenario: A framer assembles prefabricated roof trusses on the ground and prepares them for lifting.

samplePhrase.en: Check that all gusset plates are secure before lifting the truss.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica que todas las placas de gusset estén seguras antes de levantar la armadura.

framer.title: Installing Roof Trusses
framer.scenario: A framer positions and secures prefabricated trusses on the walls and installs bracing.

samplePhrase.en: Install temporary braces before removing the lifting equipment.
samplePhrase.es: Instala arriostramientos temporales antes de quitar el equipo de levante.

framer.title: Installing Roof Sheathing
framer.scenario: A framer lays and fastens plywood or OSB roof decking over the trusses.

samplePhrase.en: Space the nails every six inches on the edges and every twelve inches in the field.
samplePhrase.es: Espacía los clavos cada seis pulgadas en los bordes y cada doce pulgadas en el campo.

framer.title: Wall Bracing and Blocking
framer.scenario: A framer installs diagonal bracing, blocking, and backing in walls for strength and utilities.

samplePhrase.en: Install let-in bracing at the corners and use holdown connectors at the base.
samplePhrase.es: Instala arriostramiento de ajuste en las esquinas y usa conectores de retención en la base.

framer.title: Complex Roof Valleys and Hips
framer.scenario: A framer cuts and installs valley and hip rafters for complex roof geometry.

vocab.es: ángulo de cuarenta y cinco grados

samplePhrase.en: Adjust the valley rafter length and make cheek cuts to fit properly at the ridge.
samplePhrase.es: Ajusta el largo de la viga de valle y realiza cortes de mejilla para ajustar correctamente en la cumbrera.

foreman.title: Daily Crew Arrival
foreman.scenario: The foreman checks in with workers as they arrive at the jobsite in the morning.

samplePhrase.en: Everyone needs to clock in and put on your hard hats before we start.
samplePhrase.es: Todos necesitan registrarse y ponerse los cascos antes de empezar.

foreman.title: Morning Safety Meeting
foreman.scenario: The foreman gathers the crew for a safety briefing before work begins.

samplePhrase.en: Report any hazards immediately and never skip your safety equipment.
samplePhrase.es: Reporta cualquier peligro inmediatamente y nunca omitas tu equipo de seguridad.

foreman.title: Task Assignment
foreman.scenario: The foreman assigns specific tasks to workers for the day.

samplePhrase.en: Carlos, your team will frame the north wall this morning as the priority task.
samplePhrase.es: Carlos, tu equipo enmarcará la pared norte esta mañana como tarea de prioridad.

foreman.title: Quality Inspection Walkthrough
foreman.scenario: The foreman inspects completed work to ensure it meets standards.

samplePhrase.en: This section has defects; we need rework before it can pass inspection.
samplePhrase.es: Esta sección tiene defectos; necesitamos retrabajo antes de que pueda ser aprobada.

foreman.title: Weekly Schedule Planning
foreman.scenario: The foreman meets with the crew to review and plan the week's work.

samplePhrase.en: The weather looks good this week, so we should stay on schedule for the foundation milestone.
samplePhrase.es: El clima se ve bien esta semana, así que deberíamos mantener el cronograma para el hito de la cimentación.

foreman.title: Subcontractor Coordination
foreman.scenario: The foreman meets with a subcontractor to coordinate timing and requirements.

samplePhrase.en: The electrical subcontractor arrives Monday; make sure the wall is clear for equipment access.
samplePhrase.es: El subcontratista eléctrico llega el lunes; asegúrate de que la pared esté despejada para el acceso del equipo.

foreman.title: Safety Violation Response
foreman.scenario: The foreman corrects a worker violating safety protocols on the jobsite.

samplePhrase.en: You cannot climb that ladder without fall protection; this is an unsafe violation.
samplePhrase.es: No puedes subir esa escalera sin protección contra caídas; esta es una infracción insegura.

foreman.title: Material Shortage Management
foreman.scenario: The foreman discovers needed materials have not arrived and adjusts the plan.

samplePhrase.en: The lumber delivery is delayed; we need to reschedule framing and start the concrete work instead.
samplePhrase.es: La entrega de madera se retrasa; necesitamos reprogramar el enmarcado e iniciar el trabajo de concreto en su lugar.

foreman.title: Progress Report Documentation
foreman.scenario: The foreman documents daily progress and reports it to management.

samplePhrase.en: Today we completed 40% of the foundation; we are on budget and on schedule.
samplePhrase.es: Hoy completamos el 40% de la cimentación; estamos dentro del presupuesto y el cronograma.

foreman.title: Tool and Equipment Accountability
foreman.scenario: The foreman checks tools and equipment at the end of the workday.

samplePhrase.en: Check your tools before lockup; the drill is missing and we need accountability from everyone.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica tus herramientas antes del almacenamiento; falta el taladro y necesitamos responsabilidad de todos.

foreman.title: Crew Conflict Resolution
foreman.scenario: The foreman mediates a disagreement between two workers affecting productivity.

samplePhrase.en: I need both of you to work professionally; let's focus on cooperation and finish this section.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito que ambos trabajen profesionalmente; enfoquémonos en la cooperación y terminemos esta sección.

foreman.title: Compliance Audit Preparation
foreman.scenario: The foreman prepares the jobsite for a safety and compliance audit.

samplePhrase.en: The safety audit is Friday; ensure all certifications and training records are organized and accessible.
samplePhrase.es: La auditoría de seguridad es el viernes; asegúrate de que todos los certificados y registros de capacitación estén organizados y accesibles.

foreman.title: Shift Change Handoff
foreman.scenario: The day foreman briefs the night shift foreman on work completed and pending tasks.

samplePhrase.en: Here's the handoff: we completed the south wall, but the crane repair is urgent for tomorrow's concrete pour.
samplePhrase.es: Aquí está el traspaso: completamos la pared sur, pero la reparación de la grúa es urgente para el vertido de concreto de mañana.

foreman.title: Subcontractor Performance Review
foreman.scenario: The foreman evaluates a subcontractor's work quality and timeliness.

samplePhrase.en: The electrical work is high quality and finished on time; this subcontractor earned a good reference.
samplePhrase.es: El trabajo eléctrico es de alta calidad y se terminó a tiempo; este subcontratista se ganó una buena referencia.

foreman.title: End of Project Closeout
foreman.scenario: The foreman oversees final inspections, documentation, and crew demobilization.

samplePhrase.en: Project closeout requires final inspection, completing the punch list, and full site cleanup before crew release.
samplePhrase.es: El cierre del proyecto requiere inspección final, completar la lista de pendientes y limpieza completa del sitio antes de la liberación de la tripulación.

foreman.title: Daily Crew Briefing
foreman.scenario: The foreman gathers the crew at 7 AM to review the day's tasks, safety priorities, and work schedule.

samplePhrase.en: Listen up—today's priority is completing the foundation before the rain comes.
samplePhrase.es: Escuchen bien—la prioridad de hoy es terminar la cimentación antes de que llueva.

foreman.title: Site Safety Inspection
foreman.scenario: The foreman walks the job site to check for hazards, improper equipment use, and PPE compliance.

samplePhrase.en: You need to wear your safety glasses on this site—no exceptions.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitas usar gafas de seguridad en este sitio—sin excepciones.

foreman.title: Delegating Work to Crew
foreman.scenario: The foreman assigns specific tasks to individual workers or teams based on skill level and availability.

samplePhrase.en: Marco, I'm assigning you and your team to frame the second floor—the deadline is Friday.
samplePhrase.es: Marco, te asigno a ti y tu equipo para enmarcar el segundo piso—la fecha límite es el viernes.

foreman.title: Subcontractor Coordination
foreman.scenario: The foreman meets with electrical, plumbing, and HVAC subcontractors to coordinate their work schedules and access.

samplePhrase.en: The electrical subcontractor needs site access on Monday—make sure the area is clear by then.
samplePhrase.es: El subcontratista eléctrico necesita acceso al sitio el lunes—asegúrate de que el área esté despejada para entonces.

foreman.title: Quality Control Walkthrough
foreman.scenario: The foreman and a quality inspector review completed work sections to verify they meet specifications and standards.

samplePhrase.en: This wall doesn't meet the specifications—we need to rework it before the inspector signs off.
samplePhrase.es: Esta pared no cumple con las especificaciones—necesitamos rehacer el trabajo antes de que el inspector lo apruebe.

foreman.title: Weekly Progress Report
foreman.scenario: The foreman compiles a weekly report documenting completed work, remaining tasks, delays, and safety incidents.

samplePhrase.en: We're 65% complete this week, but we're running behind schedule due to the rain delay.
samplePhrase.es: Completamos el 65% esta semana, pero estamos atrasados en el cronograma debido al retraso por lluvia.

foreman.title: Addressing Crew Performance Issues
foreman.scenario: The foreman meets with a worker whose output or behavior is below expectations to discuss expectations and improvement.

samplePhrase.en: Your attendance has been a concern—we need to see improvement or we'll have to discuss further action.
samplePhrase.es: Tu asistencia ha sido preocupante—necesitamos ver mejora o tendremos que discutir otras acciones.

foreman.title: Scheduling Material Deliveries
foreman.scenario: The foreman coordinates with suppliers to schedule timely material deliveries and manages storage on the job site.

samplePhrase.en: The concrete delivery is scheduled for tomorrow at 8 AM—make sure the site is ready.
samplePhrase.es: La entrega de concreto está programada para mañana a las 8 AM—asegúrate de que el sitio esté listo.

foreman.title: Equipment Maintenance and Safety
foreman.scenario: The foreman ensures all power tools, machinery, and equipment are properly maintained, inspected, and operated safely.

samplePhrase.en: This saw has a malfunction—take it out of service until it's been repaired.
samplePhrase.es: Esta sierra tiene un mal funcionamiento—retírala del servicio hasta que sea reparada.

foreman.title: Managing Change Orders
foreman.scenario: The foreman processes change orders from the client, tracks impacts on timeline and budget, and communicates changes to the crew.

samplePhrase.en: We received a change order for additional framing—this will delay us by three days.
samplePhrase.es: Recibimos una orden de cambio para encuadre adicional—esto nos retrasará tres días.

foreman.title: Communicating with Project Owner
foreman.scenario: The foreman updates the project owner on progress, addresses concerns, discusses budget and timeline, and maintains professional communication.

samplePhrase.en: I wanted to update you—we're on track to hit our next milestone by the end of the month.
samplePhrase.es: Quería actualizarte—estamos en camino de cumplir nuestro próximo hito antes de fin de mes.

foreman.title: Incident Investigation and Reporting
foreman.scenario: The foreman investigates a workplace injury or near-miss, documents findings, and implements preventive measures.

samplePhrase.en: We had a near-miss today—someone almost tripped on loose lumber. We need to clean up immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Tuvimos un casi accidente hoy—alguien casi se tropieza con la madera suelta. Necesitamos limpiar inmediatamente.

foreman.title: Crew Scheduling and Shift Planning
foreman.scenario: The foreman creates weekly schedules, assigns shifts, plans for time off, and adjusts staffing based on project needs.

samplePhrase.en: Next week we'll need two shifts to stay on schedule—who's available for overtime?
samplePhrase.es: La próxima semana necesitaremos dos turnos para mantener el cronograma—¿quién está disponible para horas extras?

foreman.title: Compliance Documentation and Records
foreman.scenario: The foreman maintains required documentation including permits, licenses, training records, and safety compliance files.

samplePhrase.en: Everyone needs to complete their safety training certification by Friday—I need copies for our compliance file.
samplePhrase.es: Todos necesitan completar su certificación de capacitación en seguridad antes del viernes—necesito copias para nuestro archivo de cumplimiento.

foreman.title: End-of-Project Final Inspection and Closeout
foreman.scenario: The foreman conducts a final inspection with the owner and inspector, addresses punch list items, and prepares for project closeout and handover.

samplePhrase.en: Let's walk through the site one more time—any items on the punch list need to be corrected before we hand over to the owner.
samplePhrase.es: Hagamos un último recorrido por el sitio—cualquier elemento en la lista de tareas pendientes necesita ser corregido antes de entregar al propietario.

safety.title: Hard Hat and Head Protection
safety.scenario: A new worker arrives at the site without proper head protection and needs to be directed to get safety equipment.

samplePhrase.en: You must put on your hard hat before entering the jobsite.
samplePhrase.es: Debes ponerte el casco de seguridad antes de entrar en la obra.

safety.title: Safety Glasses and Eye Protection
safety.scenario: A worker is grinding metal without eye protection and a supervisor needs to stop the unsafe work.

samplePhrase.en: Put on your safety glasses before operating the grinder.
samplePhrase.es: Ponte las gafas de seguridad antes de usar la amoladora.

safety.title: Respirator and Dust Protection
safety.scenario: Workers are sawing concrete in an enclosed area and need respiratory protection to prevent silica dust inhalation.

samplePhrase.en: You need a respirator when cutting concrete indoors.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitas un respirador cuando cortes hormigón en interiores.

safety.title: Steel-Toed Boots and Foot Protection
safety.scenario: A worker is wearing sneakers on a steel frame construction site where heavy materials are being dropped.

samplePhrase.en: Steel-toed boots are mandatory on this construction site.
samplePhrase.es: Las botas con puntera de acero son obligatorias en esta obra.

safety.title: Work Gloves and Hand Protection
safety.scenario: A worker handling sharp rebar and concrete forms needs appropriate gloves to prevent cuts and abrasions.

samplePhrase.en: Wear cut-resistant gloves when handling rebar.
samplePhrase.es: Usa guantes resistentes al corte cuando manipules acero.

safety.title: High-Visibility Vests
safety.scenario: A worker is on a jobsite near heavy equipment traffic and traffic control zones without a visible vest.

samplePhrase.en: Always wear your high-visibility vest near the equipment.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre usa tu chaleco de alta visibilidad cerca de la maquinaria.

safety.title: Harnesses and Tie-Off Points
safety.scenario: Workers are beginning work on a roof 25 feet high and need to understand proper harness use and anchor points.

samplePhrase.en: Attach your harness to an approved anchor point before working at heights.
samplePhrase.es: Ata tu arnés a un punto de anclaje aprobado antes de trabajar en alturas.

safety.title: Scaffolding and Fall Arrest
safety.scenario: Workers are setting up scaffolding for a multi-story building and need to understand fall arrest systems.

samplePhrase.en: The scaffolding must have guardrails and be certified before use.
samplePhrase.es: El andamio debe tener barandillas y estar certificado antes de usarse.

safety.title: LOTO Procedures and Lockout Tagout
safety.scenario: Maintenance crew needs to service a large drill press that is energized and must understand lockout/tagout procedures.

samplePhrase.en: Lock out and tag the electrical supply before servicing the machine.
samplePhrase.es: Bloquea y etiqueta el suministro eléctrico antes de reparar la máquina.

safety.title: Identifying Hazards and Hazard Communication
safety.scenario: New workers arrive at a site with multiple chemical storage containers and need to understand hazard labeling and safety data sheets.

samplePhrase.en: Always read the label and safety data sheet for any chemical.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre lee la etiqueta y la hoja de datos de seguridad de cualquier químico.

safety.title: OSHA Compliance and Recordkeeping
safety.scenario: A supervisor must document an injury and ensure the company maintains OSHA compliance records for the jobsite.

samplePhrase.en: Report all injuries to OSHA within the required timeframe.
samplePhrase.es: Reporta todas las lesiones a OSHA dentro del tiempo requerido.

safety.title: Emergency Evacuation Procedures
safety.scenario: An alarm sounds during a structural emergency and workers need to understand evacuation routes and assembly points.

samplePhrase.en: When the alarm sounds, evacuate immediately to the assembly point.
samplePhrase.es: Cuando suene la alarma, evacúa inmediatamente al punto de reunión.

safety.title: Heat Stress and Hydration Safety
safety.scenario: Workers are doing exterior roofing during summer heat and need to recognize signs of heat exhaustion and dehydration.

samplePhrase.en: Drink water regularly and take breaks in the shade during hot weather.
samplePhrase.es: Bebe agua regularmente y descansa en la sombra durante el clima caluroso.

safety.title: Confined Space Entry Hazards
safety.scenario: A crew needs to enter a tank for cleaning and must understand confined space entry protocols and atmospheric testing.

samplePhrase.en: You must have a confined space permit and test the atmosphere before entering.
samplePhrase.es: Debes tener un permiso de espacio confinado y probar la atmósfera antes de entrar.

safety.title: Electrical Safety and Cord Management
safety.scenario: Workers are using multiple power tools with extension cords on a wet jobsite and need to understand electrical hazards and GFCI protection.

samplePhrase.en: Always use a GFCI-protected outlet when working in wet conditions.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre usa una toma protegida con GFCI cuando trabajes en áreas mojadas.

safety.title: Hard Hat Inspection
safety.scenario: A safety officer inspects workers' hard hats for cracks and damage before they enter the scaffold area.

samplePhrase.en: This hard hat has a crack; you need to replace it immediately.
samplePhrase.es: Este casco de seguridad tiene una grieta; tienes que reemplazarlo inmediatamente.

safety.title: Safety Glasses and Eye Protection
safety.scenario: Workers are grinding metal and the safety officer ensures everyone has proper eye protection with side shields.

samplePhrase.en: Your lenses are scratched; get new safety glasses before operating the grinder.
samplePhrase.es: Tus lentes están rayados; obtén gafas de seguridad nuevas antes de operar la amoladora.

safety.title: Hearing Protection Standards
safety.scenario: A jackhammer operator is working near the compressor, and the safety officer checks that proper earplugs or earmuffs are being worn.

samplePhrase.en: The noise level is 95 decibels; you need double protection—earplugs and earmuffs.
samplePhrase.es: El nivel de ruido es de 95 decibelios; necesitas protección doble—tapones y orejeras.

safety.title: Respiratory Protection in Demolition
safety.scenario: Workers are demolishing a wall that may contain asbestos, and the safety officer ensures N95 or P100 masks are fitted properly.

samplePhrase.en: Before entering, you must pass a fit test for your P100 respirator.
samplePhrase.es: Antes de entrar, debes pasar una prueba de ajuste para tu respirador P100.

safety.title: Fall Arrest System Setup
safety.scenario: Workers are installing a safety harness and anchorpoint system on a roofing job at 35 feet high.

samplePhrase.en: Check that the shock absorber is attached between the harness and the lanyard.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica que el amortiguador de impacto esté conectado entre el arnés y la cuerda de seguridad.

safety.title: Guardrail and Edge Protection
safety.scenario: A supervisor is checking guardrails on a new deck construction to ensure they meet OSHA height and strength requirements.

samplePhrase.en: This guardrail is missing the midrail; it must be repaired before anyone works above it.
samplePhrase.es: Esta baranda de seguridad no tiene el riel intermedio; debe repararse antes de que alguien trabaje sobre ella.

safety.title: Lockout/Tagout Basics
safety.scenario: A maintenance crew is performing repairs on a concrete mixer, and the safety officer ensures the machine is locked out and tagged.

samplePhrase.en: All energy sources must be locked out and tagged before touching this mixer.
samplePhrase.es: Todas las fuentes de energía deben bloquearse y etiquetarse antes de tocar esta mezcladora.

safety.title: Identifying Electrical Hazards
safety.scenario: An inspector walks the site identifying exposed wiring, wet conditions, and improper grounding that could cause electrocution.

samplePhrase.en: This extension cord has damaged insulation; stop using it and tag it out of service.
samplePhrase.es: Este cable de extensión tiene aislamiento dañado; deja de usarlo y etiquétalo fuera de servicio.

safety.title: Chemical Hazard Communication
safety.scenario: A worker is using a strong concrete cleaner, and the safety officer verifies that the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) is accessible and the label is understood.

samplePhrase.en: Read the SDS before using any chemical on this site.
samplePhrase.es: Lee la Hoja de datos de seguridad antes de usar cualquier producto químico en este sitio.

safety.title: Scaffold Safety Inspection
safety.scenario: A safety officer is walking a multi-level scaffold system checking for missing planks, loose connections, and proper bracing.

samplePhrase.en: This scaffold has a missing cross-brace; it must be repaired before use.
samplePhrase.es: Este andamio tiene un arriostramiento transversal faltante; debe repararse antes de usarlo.

safety.title: Housekeeping and Slip Hazards
safety.scenario: The safety officer corrects workers who left debris, water, and tools scattered on the floor that could cause trips and falls.

samplePhrase.en: Put up warning signs for wet floors and keep the area clean.
samplePhrase.es: Coloca señales de advertencia para pisos mojados y mantén el área limpia.

safety.title: Near-Miss Reporting
safety.scenario: A worker nearly drops a tool from a platform, and the safety officer uses this as an opportunity to discuss incident reporting procedures.

samplePhrase.en: This near miss must be reported so we can find out what went wrong.
samplePhrase.es: Este incidente sin daños debe reportarse para que podamos averiguar qué salió mal.

safety.title: Heat Stress Prevention
safety.scenario: Workers are pouring concrete in 95-degree heat, and the safety officer reminds them about hydration, rest breaks, and recognizing heat illness symptoms.

samplePhrase.en: Drink water every 15 minutes and take a break in the shade if you feel dizzy.
samplePhrase.es: Bebe agua cada 15 minutos y tómate un descanso en la sombra si te sientes mareado.

safety.title: Emergency Evacuation Procedures
safety.scenario: A structural fire breaks out on site, and workers must evacuate following the marked emergency routes and assembly point.

samplePhrase.en: Exit immediately using the marked emergency route and report to the assembly point.
samplePhrase.es: Sal inmediatamente usando la ruta de emergencia marcada e infórmate en el punto de reunión.

safety.title: OSHA Compliance Walkthrough
safety.scenario: An OSHA compliance officer is conducting a comprehensive safety inspection, checking PPE, hazard controls, training records, and incident documentation.

samplePhrase.en: All workers must have current safety training documentation or we will receive a citation.
samplePhrase.es: Todos los trabajadores deben tener documentación actual de capacitación de seguridad o recibiremos una citación.

plumber.title: Identifying Pipe Materials
plumber.scenario: A plumber is selecting materials for a new residential water supply installation.

samplePhrase.en: We need half-inch copper pipe with soldered fittings for this section.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos tubo de cobre de media pulgada con acoplamientos soldados para esta sección.

plumber.title: Fixture Installation Basics
plumber.scenario: A plumber is installing sinks, toilets, and shower valves in a new bathroom.

samplePhrase.en: Mount the toilet supply line eighteen inches from the wall.
samplePhrase.es: Monta la línea de suministro del inodoro a dieciocho pulgadas de la pared.

plumber.title: Drain System Components
plumber.scenario: A plumber is running drain pipes under a kitchen sink and connecting to the main stack.

samplePhrase.en: The drain needs a quarter-inch slope per foot toward the main stack.
samplePhrase.es: El desagüe necesita una inclinación de una cuarta de pulgada por pie hacia la columna principal.

plumber.title: Pressure Testing the System
plumber.scenario: A plumber is pressure testing a completed water supply system to verify no leaks.

samplePhrase.en: Pressurize the line to fifty psi and hold it for thirty minutes while we inspect.
samplePhrase.es: Presuriza la línea a cincuenta psi y mantenla durante treinta minutos mientras inspeccionamos.

plumber.title: Rough-In Water Lines
plumber.scenario: A plumber is installing water supply pipes in walls before drywall installation.

samplePhrase.en: Use a nail plate to protect the copper pipe passing through the stud.
samplePhrase.es: Usa una placa protectora para proteger el tubo de cobre que pasa a través del montante.

plumber.title: Rough-In Drain Installation
plumber.scenario: A plumber is installing DWV (drain-waste-vent) pipes in a house frame before walls close.

samplePhrase.en: Apply black primer and cement to make a secure joint on this ABS connection.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica imprimador negro y pegamento para hacer una conexión segura en esta unión ABS.

plumber.title: Code Compliance Basics
plumber.scenario: A plumber is reviewing building code requirements with an inspector before installation begins.

samplePhrase.en: The code requires a backflow preventer on all hose bibs in this jurisdiction.
samplePhrase.es: El código requiere un preventor de reflujo en todas las llave de manguera en esta jurisdicción.

plumber.title: Soldering Copper Joints
plumber.scenario: A plumber is soldering copper pipes together for a main water line installation.

samplePhrase.en: Heat the fitting evenly before feeding the lead-free solder into the joint.
samplePhrase.es: Calienta el acoplamiento uniformemente antes de introducir la soldadura sin plomo en la junta.

plumber.title: Installing Supply Stops
plumber.scenario: A plumber is installing individual shutoff valves under sinks and toilets for maintenance access.

samplePhrase.en: Tighten the compression nut with a wrench until it stops, then give it a quarter turn more.
samplePhrase.es: Aprieta la tuerca de compresión con una llave hasta que se detenga, luego gírala un cuarto de vuelta más.

plumber.title: Connecting to Existing Lines
plumber.scenario: A plumber is tapping into existing water lines to extend service to a new area of the house.

samplePhrase.en: We'll use a saddle tee to branch off from the existing main line without cutting it.
samplePhrase.es: Usaremos un tee de silla para ramificar de la línea principal existente sin cortarla.

plumber.title: Vent Stack Installation
plumber.scenario: A plumber is running vent pipes from fixtures up through the roof for proper drainage ventilation.

samplePhrase.en: The vent stack must rise vertically through the roof with proper flashing and caulking.
samplePhrase.es: La columna de ventilación debe subir verticalmente a través del techo con tapajunta y sellador adecuados.

plumber.title: Testing for Code Violations
plumber.scenario: A plumber is performing final inspections and tests to ensure all work meets local plumbing codes.

samplePhrase.en: The smoke test showed a leak in the drain line at the kitchen connection.
samplePhrase.es: La prueba de humo mostró una fuga en la línea de desagüe en la conexión de la cocina.

plumber.title: PEX Tubing Installation
plumber.scenario: A plumber is installing flexible PEX water lines using crimped fittings for a modern water distribution system.

samplePhrase.en: Crimp the ring onto the fitting with the tool until it seats completely.
samplePhrase.es: Crimpa el anillo en el acoplamiento con la herramienta hasta que asiente completamente.

plumber.title: Toilet Installation and Sealing
plumber.scenario: A plumber is setting a new toilet bowl on a flange, waxing, and securing it to code.

samplePhrase.en: Center the wax ring on the flange and press the bowl down firmly until level.
samplePhrase.es: Centra el anillo de cera en la brida y presiona el tazón firmemente hacia abajo hasta que esté nivelado.

plumber.title: Final Inspection and Cleanup
plumber.scenario: A plumber is completing a job by performing final inspections, testing all fixtures, and cleaning the work area.

samplePhrase.en: Turn on all fixtures and check for leaks before we sign off on the job.
samplePhrase.es: Abre todos los artefactos y verifica si hay fugas antes de que firmemos de conformidad en el trabajo.

plumber.title: Copper Pipe Soldering
plumber.scenario: A plumber is soldering copper pipes together on a residential water line installation.

samplePhrase.en: Heat the joint evenly before applying solder.
samplePhrase.es: Calienta la junta uniformemente antes de aplicar la soldadura.

plumber.title: PVC Pipe Cutting and Joining
plumber.scenario: Installing drain lines using PVC pipe that must be cut to length and cemented together.

samplePhrase.en: Always prime before applying PVC cement to the fitting.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre aplica imprimador antes de aplicar el cemento PVC al acoplamiento.

plumber.title: Rough-In Preparation
plumber.scenario: A plumber is laying out water and drain lines before drywall installation in a new bathroom.

samplePhrase.en: The drain line needs a quarter-inch slope per foot.
samplePhrase.es: La línea de desagüe necesita una pendiente de un cuarto de pulgada por pie.

plumber.title: Pressure Testing Lines
plumber.scenario: Testing completed water supply lines with a pressure gauge to verify integrity before connecting fixtures.

samplePhrase.en: The water line is holding at 80 PSI with no drop.
samplePhrase.es: La línea de agua se mantiene a 80 PSI sin caída.

plumber.title: Installing Shut-Off Valves
plumber.scenario: Connecting individual shut-off valves to water supply lines for fixtures under a sink.

samplePhrase.en: Turn the ball valve handle to the right to close it.
samplePhrase.es: Gira la manija de la válvula de bola hacia la derecha para cerrarla.

plumber.title: Toilet Installation and Rough-In
plumber.scenario: Installing a toilet rough-in with the wax ring and bolts before the toilet is set.

samplePhrase.en: The standard rough-in distance for a toilet is 12 inches.
samplePhrase.es: La distancia estándar de instalación bruta para un retrete es de 12 pulgadas.

plumber.title: Sink Drain Installation
plumber.scenario: Connecting drain pipes and P-traps under a kitchen sink with proper slope and ventilation.

samplePhrase.en: The P-trap must be accessible for cleaning if needed.
samplePhrase.es: La trampa P debe ser accesible para limpiarla si es necesario.

plumber.title: Shower Valve Installation
plumber.scenario: Installing a mixing valve and rough-in lines for a shower fixture during bathroom construction.

samplePhrase.en: Mount the valve body between the studs before drywall.
samplePhrase.es: Monta el cuerpo de la válvula entre los montantes antes de la drywall.

plumber.title: Code Compliance Check
plumber.scenario: A plumber is reviewing completed work with a building inspector to ensure all code requirements are met.

samplePhrase.en: All plumbing must meet the current building code for this area.
samplePhrase.es: Toda la fontanería debe cumplir con el código de construcción actual para esta área.

plumber.title: Water Heater Connection
plumber.scenario: Connecting hot and cold water lines to a new water heater and installing the vent and drain lines.

samplePhrase.en: Install the relief valve on the top of the water heater.
samplePhrase.es: Instala la válvula de alivio en la parte superior del calentador de agua.

plumber.title: Vent Stack Installation
plumber.scenario: Installing the main vent stack that rises through the roof to provide proper drainage ventilation.

samplePhrase.en: The vent stack must extend at least 12 inches above the roof.
samplePhrase.es: El tubo de ventilación debe extenderse al menos 12 pulgadas por encima del techo.

plumber.title: Main Drain Line Slope
plumber.scenario: Laying out the main drain line from the house to the septic system with proper slope verification.

vocab.es: un cuarto de pulgada por pie

samplePhrase.en: Check the slope with a level and string line every 10 feet.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica la pendiente con un nivel y un hilo cada 10 pies.

plumber.title: Backflow Prevention Device
plumber.scenario: Installing a backflow preventer on the main water line to meet code requirements in a commercial building.

samplePhrase.en: The arrow on the backflow preventer must point toward the building.
samplePhrase.es: La flecha en el prevención de reflujo debe apuntar hacia el edificio.

plumber.title: Fixture Installation Height
plumber.scenario: Installing bathroom fixtures at proper heights according to code and ADA requirements.

samplePhrase.en: The sink must be no higher than 48 inches for ADA compliance.
samplePhrase.es: El fregadero no debe ser más alto que 48 pulgadas para cumplir con ADA.

plumber.title: Final Inspection Prep
plumber.scenario: A plumber is preparing all systems for final inspection before customer handoff and occupancy.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure all shut-off valves operate smoothly before final inspection.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que todas las válvulas de cierre funcionen suavemente antes de la inspección final.

drywall.title: Starting the Hang
drywall.scenario: You're beginning to hang drywall sheets on a new wall frame.

samplePhrase.en: We need to measure the studs before we hang the first sheet.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos medir los montantes antes de colgar la primera hoja.

drywall.title: Securing Sheets
drywall.scenario: You're fastening drywall sheets to the wall frame with drywall screws.

samplePhrase.en: Space the screws twelve inches apart along the studs.
samplePhrase.es: Espacía los tornillos doce pulgadas aparte en los montantes.

drywall.title: Hanging Around Openings
drywall.scenario: You're cutting and hanging drywall around a door or window opening.

samplePhrase.en: Mark the window opening on the drywall sheet before cutting.
samplePhrase.es: Marca la abertura de la ventana en la hoja antes de cortar.

drywall.title: First Tape Application
drywall.scenario: You're applying the first layer of joint tape over seams after hanging is complete.

samplePhrase.en: Embed the tape into the mud along the seam carefully.
samplePhrase.es: Incrusta la cinta en el lodo a lo largo de la junta cuidadosamente.

drywall.title: Mudding the First Coat
drywall.scenario: You're applying the first coat of joint compound (mud) over the taped seams.

samplePhrase.en: Apply the first coat of mud with a six-inch knife.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica la primera mano de lodo con una cuchilla de seis pulgadas.

drywall.title: Corner Bead Installation
drywall.scenario: You're installing corner bead on inside and outside corners.

samplePhrase.en: Install the corner bead on the outside corner with the nail gun.
samplePhrase.es: Instala la cinta de esquina en la esquina exterior con la clavadora.

drywall.title: Second Coat Application
drywall.scenario: You're applying the second coat of mud after the first coat has dried.

samplePhrase.en: The second coat should be wider and thinner than the first coat.
samplePhrase.es: La segunda mano debe ser más ancha y más delgada que la primera.

drywall.title: Sanding Between Coats
drywall.scenario: You're sanding dried mud between coats to create a smooth surface.

samplePhrase.en: Sand the dried mud with 120-grit sandpaper to smooth the surface.
samplePhrase.es: Lija el lodo seco con papel de lija de 120 granos para suavizar la superficie.

drywall.title: Third Coat and Corner Finishing
drywall.scenario: You're applying the final coat of mud and finishing corners before texturing.

samplePhrase.en: Apply the finish coat with a ten-inch knife for a smooth final surface.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica la mano de acabado con una cuchilla de diez pulgadas para una superficie final suave.

drywall.title: Texturing Preparation
drywall.scenario: You're preparing the mudded walls for texture application.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the walls are clean and primed before applying texture.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que las paredes estén limpias e imprimadas antes de aplicar textura.

drywall.title: Spray Texturing
drywall.scenario: You're spraying texture onto prepared drywall surfaces.

samplePhrase.en: Spray the texture with even coverage and consistent pattern.
samplePhrase.es: Rocía la textura con cobertura uniforme y patrón consistente.

drywall.title: Knockdown Texturing
drywall.scenario: You're using a knockdown knife to flatten spray texture for a finished look.

samplePhrase.en: Lightly flatten the wet texture with a knockdown knife for a professional finish.
samplePhrase.es: Aplana ligeramente la textura húmeda con una cuchilla de aplastado para un acabado profesional.

drywall.title: Final Inspection and Touch-ups
drywall.scenario: You're inspecting the finished drywall work and making final corrections.

samplePhrase.en: Inspect the walls for any gaps or imperfections before final approval.
samplePhrase.es: Inspecciona las paredes para cualquier hueco o imperfección antes de la aprobación final.

drywall.title: Priming and Paint Preparation
drywall.scenario: You're preparing textured walls for primer and paint application.

samplePhrase.en: Apply primer to the textured walls before the final paint coat.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica imprimador a las paredes texturizadas antes de la mano de pintura final.

drywall.title: Project Completion and Cleanup
drywall.scenario: You're finishing the drywall job and cleaning up the work area.

samplePhrase.en: The drywall installation is complete; now we need to do a final cleanup.
samplePhrase.es: La instalación de drywall está completa; ahora necesitamos hacer una limpieza final.

drywall.title: Hanging Drywall on Curved Walls
drywall.scenario: You're hanging drywall on a curved interior wall and need to communicate about bending techniques and measurements.

samplePhrase.en: We need to wet the drywall to make it flexible for this curved wall.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos mojar el yeso para hacerlo flexible para esta pared curva.

drywall.title: Taping Inside Corners
drywall.scenario: You're applying joint tape to inside corners and discussing the technique with your crew.

vocab.es: crear un pliegue en la cinta

samplePhrase.en: Crease the tape down the middle so it fits perfectly in the corner.
samplePhrase.es: Crea un pliegue en el medio de la cinta para que encaje perfectamente en la esquina.

drywall.title: Applying Corner Bead on Drywall
drywall.scenario: Installing metal corner bead on outside corners and ensuring it's straight and secure.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the corner bead is perfectly straight before you nail it.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que la cinta de esquina esté perfectamente recta antes de clavarla.

drywall.title: First Coat of Mud on Seams
drywall.scenario: Applying the initial coat of joint compound over taped seams with proper technique.

samplePhrase.en: Apply the first coat with light pressure to embed the tape.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica la primera capa con presión ligera para incrustar la cinta.

drywall.title: Mudding Outside Corners with Bead
drywall.scenario: Covering corner bead with joint compound on exterior corners and creating a smooth finish.

samplePhrase.en: Use a 12-inch knife to feather both sides of the corner bead evenly.
samplePhrase.es: Usa una cuchilla de 12 pulgadas para desflecador ambos lados de la cinta de esquina uniformemente.

drywall.title: Sanding First Coat Mud
drywall.scenario: Preparing the first coat of dried mud for the second coat by sanding it smooth.

samplePhrase.en: Sand the first coat lightly with 120-grit paper to remove bumps.
samplePhrase.es: Lija la primera capa ligeramente con papel de lija 120 para eliminar las protuberancias.

drywall.title: Second Coat Application on Seams
drywall.scenario: Applying the second coat of joint compound over sanded first coat on seams.

samplePhrase.en: The second coat should be wider and thinner to make the seam disappear.
samplePhrase.es: La segunda capa debe ser más ancha y delgada para que la costura desaparezca.

drywall.title: Texturing Walls with Spray Equipment
drywall.scenario: Using spray texture equipment to apply texture finish to drywall surfaces.

samplePhrase.en: Keep the spray gun at the same distance for an even texture pattern.
samplePhrase.es: Mantén la pistola rociadora a la misma distancia para un patrón de textura uniforme.

drywall.title: Popcorn Texture Application
drywall.scenario: Applying popcorn or acoustic texture to ceilings and walls using spray equipment.

samplePhrase.en: The popcorn texture mixture needs to be thinner for better spray coverage.
samplePhrase.es: La mezcla de textura de palomitas necesita ser más delgada para una mejor cobertura de rociado.

drywall.title: Knockdown Texture Finishing
drywall.scenario: Applying and flattening knockdown texture for a decorative finish.

samplePhrase.en: Spray the knockdown texture lightly, then flatten the peaks with a trowel.
samplePhrase.es: Rocía la textura de golpe ligeramente, luego aplana las cimas con una llana.

drywall.title: Sanding Between Finish Coats
drywall.scenario: Sanding between second and third coats to ensure smooth surface preparation.

samplePhrase.en: Sand lightly with 150-grit between coats to remove dust nibs.
samplePhrase.es: Lija ligeramente con 150 entre capas para eliminar granos de polvo.

drywall.title: Third Finish Coat Application
drywall.scenario: Applying the final finish coat for a wall ready for paint or primer.

samplePhrase.en: The final coat should be so thin you can barely see the seams.
samplePhrase.es: La capa final debe ser tan delgada que apenas puedas ver las costuras.

drywall.title: Sanding Finish Coat to Walls
drywall.scenario: Final sanding of third coat to achieve a paint-ready smooth surface.

samplePhrase.en: Use 180-grit paper and sand very lightly to get the wall paint-ready.
samplePhrase.es: Usa papel de lija 180 y lija muy ligeramente para que la pared esté lista para pintar.

drywall.title: Textured Ceiling Finishing
drywall.scenario: Applying final texture and ensuring even coverage on ceiling surfaces.

samplePhrase.en: Maintain a wet edge while spraying the texture to avoid visible lines.
samplePhrase.es: Mantén un borde mojado mientras rocías la textura para evitar líneas visibles.

drywall.title: Quality Control and Touch-Ups
drywall.scenario: Final inspection of all mudded, sanded, and textured areas with touch-ups as needed.

samplePhrase.en: Use a spotlight to find any remaining tool marks that need touch-up.
samplePhrase.es: Usa un reflector para encontrar cualquier marca de herramienta que necesite retoque.

electrician.title: Basic Wire Identification
electrician.scenario: An electrician needs to identify different wire gauges and types at the supply warehouse before a residential job.

samplePhrase.en: We need twelve gauge copper wire for this panel upgrade.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos cable de cobre calibre doce para esta actualización de panel.

electrician.title: Conduit and Support Systems
electrician.scenario: A crew is installing electrical conduit along the frame of a new office building.

samplePhrase.en: Install metal conduit with clamps every three feet along this wall.
samplePhrase.es: Instala tubería metálica con abrazaderas cada tres pies a lo largo de esta pared.

electrician.title: Electrical Outlets Installation
electrician.scenario: An electrician is roughing in outlets for a new kitchen renovation.

samplePhrase.en: Mount the GFCI outlet near the sink at least eighteen inches above the counter.
samplePhrase.es: Monta el tomacorriente GFCI cerca del fregadero a por lo menos dieciocho pulgadas sobre la encimera.

electrician.title: Light Switches and Circuits
electrician.scenario: A worker is installing three-way switches in a hallway of a commercial building.

samplePhrase.en: Connect the traveler wires to the three-way switches at each end of the hall.
samplePhrase.es: Conecta los cables viajeros a los interruptores de tres vías en cada extremo del pasillo.

electrician.title: Service Panel Basics
electrician.scenario: An electrician is preparing to upgrade an old 100-amp service panel to 200 amps.

samplePhrase.en: The main breaker must be installed in the top position of the service panel.
samplePhrase.es: El disyuntor principal debe instalarse en la posición superior del panel de servicio.

electrician.title: Grounding and Bonding
electrician.scenario: A crew is grounding a new metal frame structure on a commercial site.

samplePhrase.en: Drive the ground rod eight feet deep and attach the grounding conductor with a proper clamp.
samplePhrase.es: Clava la varilla de tierra ocho pies de profundidad y conecta el conductor de tierra con una abrazadera adecuada.

electrician.title: NEC Code Compliance Overview
electrician.scenario: An inspector is reviewing rough electrical work on a new residential addition.

samplePhrase.en: All conduit runs must be supported every three feet to meet code requirements.
samplePhrase.es: Todos los tramos de tubería deben estar soportados cada tres pies para cumplir con los requisitos del código.

electrician.title: High-Amperage Circuits
electrician.scenario: An electrician is installing dedicated circuits for a washer, dryer, and range in a remodel.

samplePhrase.en: Install a double pole 50 amp breaker with 6 gauge copper wire for the electric range.
samplePhrase.es: Instala un disyuntor de doble polo de 50 amperios con cable de cobre calibre 6 para la estufa eléctrica.

electrician.title: Device Installation Techniques
electrician.scenario: A worker is installing multiple outlets and switches in a rough-in phase.

samplePhrase.en: Install the gangable outlet boxes side by side and ensure they are flush with the stud.
samplePhrase.es: Instala las cajas de tomacorrientes acoplables una al lado de la otra y asegúrate de que estén al ras con el montante.

electrician.title: Safety and PPE On Site
electrician.scenario: A crew is setting up safety protocols before beginning work on a live panel.

samplePhrase.en: Always test for live voltage with a meter before touching any wires in the panel.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre prueba el voltaje vivo con un medidor antes de tocar cualquier cable en el panel.

electrician.title: Service Call Troubleshooting
electrician.scenario: An electrician arrives at a residence where multiple outlets have stopped working.

samplePhrase.en: Check if the reset button on the GFCI outlet will restore power to the circuit.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica si el botón de reinicio en el tomacorriente GFCI restablecerá la energía al circuito.

electrician.title: Wire Termination and Connections
electrician.scenario: An electrician is making terminal connections inside a distribution box.

samplePhrase.en: Strip three-quarter inch of insulation and crimp the terminal lug with the proper tool.
samplePhrase.es: Pela tres cuartos de pulgada de aislante y engarza la terminal de lengüeta con la herramienta adecuada.

electrician.title: GFCI and AFCI Protection
electrician.scenario: An electrician is installing GFCI and AFCI devices in kitchens and bedrooms per code.

samplePhrase.en: Install GFCI protection on all kitchen countertop outlets within six feet of the sink.
samplePhrase.es: Instala protección GFCI en todos los tomacorrientes de encimera de cocina a menos de seis pies del fregadero.

electrician.title: Cable Routing and Planning
electrician.scenario: A crew is planning wire runs through walls and attic before installation begins.

samplePhrase.en: Use a fish tape to pull the wire through the wall cavity from the panel to the outlet box.
samplePhrase.es: Usa una cinta pasacables para tirar del cable a través de la cavidad de la pared desde el panel hasta la caja de tomacorriente.

electrician.title: Final Inspection and Documentation
electrician.scenario: An electrician prepares for a final electrical inspection and completes job documentation.

samplePhrase.en: Label every breaker in the panel directory and provide the homeowner with a complete circuit map.
samplePhrase.es: Etiqueta cada disyuntor en el directorio del panel y proporciona al propietario un mapa de circuito completo.

electrician.title: Identifying Panel Types
electrician.scenario: An electrician arrives at a residential job to upgrade the main electrical panel.

samplePhrase.en: This panel is rated for 200 amps.
samplePhrase.es: Este panel tiene una clasificación de 200 amperios.

electrician.title: Running Conduit Through Walls
electrician.scenario: Electricians are installing rigid conduit through framing in a new commercial building.

samplePhrase.en: Run the conduit 16 inches from the corner.
samplePhrase.es: Coloca el tubo a 16 pulgadas de la esquina.

electrician.title: Installing GFCI Outlets
electrician.scenario: An electrician installs ground-fault circuit interrupter outlets in a kitchen near the sink.

samplePhrase.en: Install the GFCI outlet within 6 feet of the sink.
samplePhrase.es: Instala el tomacorriente GFCI a menos de 6 pies del fregadero.

electrician.title: Three-Way Switch Installation
electrician.scenario: A technician installs three-way switches to control a hallway light from two locations.

samplePhrase.en: Connect the traveler wires to both switches.
samplePhrase.es: Conecta los alambres de viajero a ambos interruptores.

electrician.title: Grounding System Inspection
electrician.scenario: An electrician tests the grounding system and equipment at a commercial facility.

samplePhrase.en: Test the ground resistance with the megohm meter.
samplePhrase.es: Prueba la resistencia de tierra con el medidor de megohm.

electrician.title: Code Compliance for Service Entrance
electrician.scenario: An inspector reviews a new service entrance installation for code violations.

samplePhrase.en: The service entrance must have 36 inches of clear working space.
samplePhrase.es: La entrada de servicio debe tener 36 pulgadas de espacio de trabajo despejado.

electrician.title: Double-Pole Breaker Circuit
electrician.scenario: An electrician installs a 240-volt circuit for an electric dryer using a double-pole breaker.

samplePhrase.en: Use a 30-amp double-pole breaker for the electric range.
samplePhrase.es: Usa un disyuntor de dos polos de 30 amperios para la estufa eléctrica.

electrician.title: AFCI Protection Requirements
electrician.scenario: Technician installs arc-fault circuit interrupter protection in bedroom circuits per code.

samplePhrase.en: All bedroom outlets must be protected by AFCI devices.
samplePhrase.es: Todos los tomacorrientes del dormitorio deben estar protegidos por dispositivos AFCI.

electrician.title: Troubleshooting Dead Circuits
electrician.scenario: An electrician responds to a service call where a circuit has completely lost power.

samplePhrase.en: Check the breaker first, then test for voltage at the outlets.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica el disyuntor primero, luego prueba el voltaje en los tomacorrientes.

electrician.title: Installing Dimmer Switches
electrician.scenario: An electrician replaces a standard wall switch with a dimmer switch in a dining room.

samplePhrase.en: This LED dimmer switch can handle up to 600 watts.
samplePhrase.es: Este interruptor atenuador LED puede manejar hasta 600 vatios.

electrician.title: 240V Outlet Installation
electrician.scenario: A technician installs a 240-volt outlet for a new air conditioning unit on the exterior wall.

samplePhrase.en: Install the 240V outlet with a weatherproof enclosure.
samplePhrase.es: Instala el tomacorriente de 240V con un recinto a prueba de tiempo.

electrician.title: Subpanel Installation
electrician.scenario: An electrician installs a subpanel in a detached garage with its own separate service.

samplePhrase.en: The subpanel requires a separate ground rod in the garage.
samplePhrase.es: El subpanel requiere una varilla de tierra separada en el garaje.

electrician.title: Outlet Box Fill Calculations
electrician.scenario: An electrician ensures proper wire and device fill in tight outlet boxes during rough-in phase.

samplePhrase.en: This box can hold a maximum of four #12 wires.
samplePhrase.es: Esta caja puede contener un máximo de cuatro alambres #12.

electrician.title: Service Call: Overloaded Circuit
electrician.scenario: Electrician responds to customer complaint about a breaker tripping repeatedly during peak usage.

samplePhrase.en: We need to move some appliances to separate circuits to prevent overloading.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos mover algunos electrodomésticos a circuitos separados para evitar sobrecargas.

electrician.title: Conduit Fill and Wire Spacing
electrician.scenario: Electrician calculates proper conduit sizing and wire fill percentages for a multi-wire installation.

samplePhrase.en: You cannot exceed 40 percent fill in this one-inch conduit.
samplePhrase.es: No puedes exceder el 40 por ciento de llenado en este tubo de una pulgada.

truck-driver.title: Arrival and Manifest Check
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver arrives at the warehouse and receives the delivery manifest from the dispatcher.

samplePhrase.en: I need to confirm all the items on this manifest before loading.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito confirmar todos los artículos en este manifiesto antes de cargar.

truck-driver.title: Loading Dock Operations
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver backs into the loading dock and prepares to load materials with warehouse staff.

samplePhrase.en: Please stack the pallets carefully on the truck bed.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, apila las paletas cuidadosamente en la cama del camión.

truck-driver.title: Securing Load with Straps
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver secures a load of construction materials using straps and chains before departure.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure all straps are tight before we leave the dock.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que todas las correas estén apretadas antes de salir del muelle.

truck-driver.title: DOT Compliance Inspection
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver performs a pre-trip DOT inspection and reviews safety requirements with a supervisor.

samplePhrase.en: I completed the DOT inspection and found no violations today.
samplePhrase.es: Completé la inspección DOT y no encontré infracciones hoy.

truck-driver.title: Route Planning and Directions
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver receives route instructions from dispatch and confirms delivery locations and stops.

samplePhrase.en: What is the first delivery stop on my route today?
samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es la primera parada de entrega en mi ruta hoy?

truck-driver.title: Weight and Dimension Verification
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver stops at a weigh station to verify load weight and confirm compliance with regulations.

samplePhrase.en: Please drive slowly onto the scale to get an accurate weight.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, conduce lentamente sobre la báscula para obtener un peso preciso.

truck-driver.title: Communication with Warehouse Coordinator
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver calls the warehouse coordinator to confirm arrival time and dock availability.

samplePhrase.en: I will arrive at the warehouse in about two hours. Is the dock available?
samplePhrase.es: Llegaré al almacén en aproximadamente dos horas. ¿Está disponible el muelle?

truck-driver.title: Unloading and Damage Assessment
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver oversees unloading of materials at a construction site and documents any damage.

samplePhrase.en: I found damage on three pallets. I took photos for the damage report.
samplePhrase.es: Encontré daño en tres paletas. Tomé fotos para el reporte de daño.

truck-driver.title: Packing Slips and Bill of Lading
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver verifies packing slips against the bill of lading and reconciles items with the receiver.

samplePhrase.en: The packing slip shows 50 bags, but I only count 48 bags on the truck.
samplePhrase.es: La hoja de embalaje muestra 50 bolsas, pero solo cuento 48 bolsas en el camión.

truck-driver.title: Hours of Service Regulations
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver logs hours in the logbook and confirms compliance with DOT hours-of-service rules.

samplePhrase.en: I need to log my driving time and take a 30-minute break according to DOT regulations.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito registrar mi tiempo de conducción y tomar un descanso de 30 minutos según las regulaciones DOT.

truck-driver.title: Hazardous Material Placarding
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver loads hazardous materials and ensures proper placarding and documentation are in place.

samplePhrase.en: This shipment contains flammable materials, so we must display proper placards.
samplePhrase.es: Este envío contiene materiales inflamables, así que debemos mostrar etiquetas de peligro adecuadas.

truck-driver.title: Fuel and Maintenance Log
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver refuels the truck and updates the maintenance log with any mechanical issues.

samplePhrase.en: I refueled the truck and logged the mileage. There are no issues to report.
samplePhrase.es: Puse combustible al camión y registré el kilometraje. No hay problemas que reportar.

truck-driver.title: Delivery Confirmation and Signatures
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver obtains signatures from the receiver confirming delivery of all materials.

samplePhrase.en: Please sign here to confirm you received all materials in good condition.
samplePhrase.es: Por favor, firma aquí para confirmar que recibiste todos los materiales en buenas condiciones.

truck-driver.title: Return Load Coordination
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver arranges a return load with the warehouse coordinator to maximize efficiency and avoid empty trips.

samplePhrase.en: Do you have a return load available? I do not want to drive back with an empty truck.
samplePhrase.es: ¿Tienes una carga de retorno disponible? No quiero regresar con el camión vacío.

truck-driver.title: End-of-Day Paperwork and Digital Reporting
truck-driver.scenario: A truck driver completes end-of-day paperwork, uploads digital reports, and confirms all deliveries with dispatch.

samplePhrase.en: I have completed all deliveries for today and uploaded the digital reports to the system.
samplePhrase.es: He completado todas las entregas de hoy y cargué los reportes digitales en el sistema.

truck-driver.title: Bill of Lading Verification
truck-driver.scenario: Driver checks the bill of lading against actual cargo before departing the warehouse.

samplePhrase.en: The bill of lading shows fifteen pallets, but I only count fourteen.
samplePhrase.es: El conocimiento de embarque muestra quince palés, pero solo cuento catorce.

truck-driver.title: Loading Dock Safety Protocol
truck-driver.scenario: Driver oversees loading operations at the dock and communicates safety requirements.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the load is secure before we pull away from the dock.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que la carga esté segura antes de que nos alejemos del muelle.

truck-driver.title: Tractor-Trailer Configuration
truck-driver.scenario: Driver inspects and discusses trailer setup for a heavy materials delivery.

samplePhrase.en: This trailer's tandem axles are rated for forty-eight thousand pounds.
samplePhrase.es: Los ejes tándem de este remolque están clasificados para cuarenta y ocho mil libras.

truck-driver.title: DOT Compliance Inspection
truck-driver.scenario: Driver conducts a Department of Transportation inspection before hitting the road.

samplePhrase.en: I need to log my hours of service before we depart.
samplePhrase.es: Necesito registrar mis horas de servicio antes de que nos vayamos.

truck-driver.title: Route Planning and Dispatch
truck-driver.scenario: Driver receives route instructions from dispatch and reviews traffic conditions and construction zones.

samplePhrase.en: Dispatch says there is construction on Highway 40; we need to take an alternate route.
samplePhrase.es: Despacho dice que hay construcción en la carretera 40; necesitamos tomar una ruta alternativa.

truck-driver.title: Weight and Axle Load Compliance
truck-driver.scenario: Driver stops at a weigh station and communicates load distribution information.

vocab.es: clasificación de peso bruto del vehículo

samplePhrase.en: The weigh station shows we are two thousand pounds over the steer axle limit.
samplePhrase.es: La estación de pesaje muestra que estamos dos mil libras arriba del límite del eje de dirección.

truck-driver.title: Hazardous Materials Documentation
truck-driver.scenario: Driver reviews hazmat placards and shipping papers before transporting dangerous goods.

samplePhrase.en: This load contains Class 3 flammable liquids; the hazmat placard must be visible on all sides.
samplePhrase.es: Esta carga contiene líquidos inflamables clase 3; la placa de materiales peligrosos debe ser visible en todos los lados.

truck-driver.title: Warehouse Receiving Coordination
truck-driver.scenario: Driver communicates with warehouse receiving team about delivery timing and dock assignments.

samplePhrase.en: The warehouse scheduled us for dock number three at two o'clock.
samplePhrase.es: El almacén nos programó para el muelle número tres a las dos de la tarde.

truck-driver.title: Delivery Route Adjustment
truck-driver.scenario: Driver communicates with dispatch about road delays and discusses alternative delivery sequences.

samplePhrase.en: We have a two-hour delay due to an accident; please notify the customer of the revised delivery time.
samplePhrase.es: Tenemos un retraso de dos horas debido a un accidente; por favor notifica al cliente la hora de entrega revisada.

truck-driver.title: Material Segregation at Jobsite
truck-driver.scenario: Driver directs unloading of multiple material types and ensures proper site organization.

samplePhrase.en: Stack the lumber over there and keep the metal rebar in a separate area away from the concrete blocks.
samplePhrase.es: Apila la madera allá y mantén la varilla de metal en un área separada lejos de los bloques de concreto.

truck-driver.title: Pickup Load Consolidation
truck-driver.scenario: Driver collects partial loads from multiple jobsites and consolidates them for transport.

samplePhrase.en: We will consolidate all three pickups into one full truckload before heading to the distribution center.
samplePhrase.es: Consolidaremos las tres recogidas en una carga de camión completa antes de ir al centro de distribución.

truck-driver.title: Cross-Docking Operations
truck-driver.scenario: Driver manages rapid transfer of goods from inbound to outbound trailers at a cross-dock facility.

samplePhrase.en: This cross-dock operation transfers goods in less than two hours from inbound to outbound.
samplePhrase.es: Esta operación de transferencia directa traslada mercancías en menos de dos horas de entrada a salida.

truck-driver.title: Equipment Attachment and Detachment
truck-driver.scenario: Driver manages coupling and uncoupling of trailers at distribution hubs.

samplePhrase.en: Always check the air and electrical connections before coupling the trailer.
samplePhrase.es: Siempre verifica las conexiones de aire y eléctricas antes de enganchar el remolque.

truck-driver.title: Customs and Border Documentation
truck-driver.scenario: Driver prepares and reviews documents for cross-border transport of construction materials.

samplePhrase.en: The customs broker will handle the import declaration for these materials at the border.
samplePhrase.es: El agente aduanal manejará la declaración de importación para estos materiales en la frontera.

truck-driver.title: Return Load Planning and Backhaul
truck-driver.scenario: Driver coordinates return shipment logistics to maximize vehicle utilization and reduce empty miles.

samplePhrase.en: We found a backhaul load from the warehouse; we can pick up materials for the return trip.
samplePhrase.es: Encontramos una carga de retorno del almacén; podemos recoger materiales para el viaje de regreso.

landscaper.title: Basic Lawn Mowing
landscaper.scenario: A crew member needs to mow a residential front lawn for the first time.

samplePhrase.en: Check the blade height before you mow the grass.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica la altura de la cuchilla antes de cortar el pasto.

landscaper.title: Watering and Irrigation Setup
landscaper.scenario: A worker is setting up a sprinkler system for a new garden bed.

samplePhrase.en: Turn on the valve to check the water pressure.
samplePhrase.es: Abre la válvula para verificar la presión del agua.

landscaper.title: Fertilizing the Lawn
landscaper.scenario: A crew is applying fertilizer to a large yard that needs nutrient boost.

samplePhrase.en: Fill the spreader with fertilizer and follow the pattern on the label.
samplePhrase.es: Llena el esparcidor con fertilizante y sigue el patrón en la etiqueta.

landscaper.title: Planting Shrubs and Trees
landscaper.scenario: Workers are digging holes and planting new bushes along a property line.

samplePhrase.en: Dig the hole as deep as the root ball and space them three feet apart.
samplePhrase.es: Cava el hoyo tan profundo como el cepellón y espacialos a tres pies de distancia.

landscaper.title: Installing Garden Beds
landscaper.scenario: A crew is building a raised garden bed with landscape timber and soil.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the corners are square and the bed is level.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que las esquinas sean cuadradas y que el cantero esté nivelado.

landscaper.title: Laying Mulch
landscaper.scenario: A team is spreading wood chips around newly planted trees to retain moisture.

samplePhrase.en: Spread the mulch two inches deep and keep it away from the trunk.
samplePhrase.es: Esparce el mantillo a dos pulgadas de profundidad y mantenlo alejado del tronco.

landscaper.title: Basic Hardscape Layout
landscaper.scenario: Workers are laying out a patio area and marking lines for pavers.

samplePhrase.en: Use the chalk line to mark the grid for the pavers.
samplePhrase.es: Usa la línea de tiza para marcar la rejilla de las losas.

landscaper.title: Installing Pavers
landscaper.scenario: A crew is setting concrete or stone pavers on sand base for a walkway.

samplePhrase.en: Tap each paver with the mallet to level it with the sand.
samplePhrase.es: Golpea cada losa con el mazo para nivelarla con la arena.

landscaper.title: Drainage Installation
landscaper.scenario: Workers are installing a French drain to prevent water pooling in a yard.

samplePhrase.en: Dig the trench with a slight slope toward the drain outlet.
samplePhrase.es: Cava la zanja con una ligera pendiente hacia la salida de drenaje.

landscaper.title: Soil Preparation
landscaper.scenario: A crew is tilling and amending soil before planting a new garden area.

samplePhrase.en: Till the soil eight inches deep and mix in the compost thoroughly.
samplePhrase.es: Labra la tierra a ocho pulgadas de profundidad y mezcla bien el abono.

landscaper.title: Answering Client Questions
landscaper.scenario: A supervisor needs to explain lawn care recommendations to the property owner.

samplePhrase.en: We recommend fertilizing every six weeks during the growing season.
samplePhrase.es: Recomendamos fertilizar cada seis semanas durante la temporada de crecimiento.

landscaper.title: Trimming and Edging
landscaper.scenario: A worker is using a string trimmer and edger to finish the lawn boundaries.

samplePhrase.en: Use the edger to create a clean line between the lawn and the driveway.
samplePhrase.es: Usa la bordeadora para crear una línea limpia entre el pasto y la entrada.

landscaper.title: Removing Weeds
landscaper.scenario: Workers are hand-pulling weeds from a flower bed and preparing to apply herbicide.

samplePhrase.en: Pull the weeds from the roots and apply the herbicide to prevent regrowth.
samplePhrase.es: Arranca las malezas desde las raíces y aplica el herbicida para prevenir el rebrote.

landscaper.title: Hardscape Finishing
landscaper.scenario: A crew is grouting pavers and sealing a newly completed stone patio.

samplePhrase.en: Apply the sealer evenly and allow 24 hours for it to cure completely.
samplePhrase.es: Aplica el sellador uniformemente y permite 24 horas para que se cure completamente.

landscaper.title: Site Safety and Communication
landscaper.scenario: A supervisor is briefing the crew on job site hazards and daily work plan.

samplePhrase.en: Wear your gloves and safety glasses at all times when operating equipment.
samplePhrase.es: Usa tus guantes y gafas de seguridad en todo momento al operar el equipo.

landscaper.title: Spring Bed Preparation
landscaper.scenario: Preparing flower beds for spring planting by removing debris and amending soil.

samplePhrase.en: We need to add three inches of compost to this bed.
samplePhrase.es: Necesitamos agregar tres pulgadas de abono orgánico a este macizo.

landscaper.title: Shrub Planting Installation
landscaper.scenario: Installing new shrubs in a landscape design with proper spacing and depth.

samplePhrase.en: Make sure the hole is twice as wide as the root ball.
samplePhrase.es: Asegúrate de que el hoyo sea el doble del ancho del cepellón.

landscaper.title: Drip Irrigation Installation
landscaper.scenario: Setting up drip irrigation lines for a new planting area to ensure efficient watering.

samplePhrase.en: Place the emitters every eighteen inches along the line.
samplePhrase.es: Coloca los emisores cada dieciocho pulgadas a lo largo de la línea.

landscaper.title: Hardscape Edge Installation
landscaper.scenario: Installing decorative edging between lawn and planting beds to define landscape areas.

samplePhrase.en: The edging needs to follow a straight line along the driveway.
samplePhrase.es: El borde decorativo debe seguir una línea recta a lo largo del camino de entrada.

landscaper.title: Lawn Fertilization Application
landscaper.scenario: Applying granular and liquid fertilizers to established lawns for proper nutrient balance.

samplePhrase.en: Set the spreader to medium for even fertilizer distribution.
samplePhrase.es: Ajusta el esparcidor a medio para una distribución uniforme del fertilizante.

landscaper.title: Mowing Pattern and Technique
landscaper.scenario: Mowing a large residential lawn using proper cutting patterns and blade height.

samplePhrase.en: Mow in a checkerboard pattern and keep the blade at two and a half inches.
samplePhrase.es: Corta en un patrón de tablero de ajedrez y mantén la cuchilla a dos pulgadas y media.

landscaper.title: French Drain Installation
landscaper.scenario: Installing a French drain system to manage drainage in wet or problem areas.

samplePhrase.en: The drain needs a one percent slope to direct water away from the foundation.
samplePhrase.es: El drenaje necesita una pendiente del uno por ciento para dirigir el agua lejos de la base.

landscaper.title: Client Consultation and Design Discussion
landscaper.scenario: Meeting with a homeowner to discuss landscape design plans, budget, and timeline.

samplePhrase.en: What is your budget for this landscaping project?
