samplePhrase.es: ¿Cuál es tu presupuesto para este proyecto de paisajismo?

landscaper.title: Perennial Garden Planting
landscaper.scenario: Planting perennial flowers in organized beds with proper spacing and care instructions.

samplePhrase.en: Plant the tall flowers in the back and short ones in the front.
samplePhrase.es: Planta las flores altas en la parte posterior y las cortas en el frente.

landscaper.title: Lawn Aeration and Seeding
landscaper.scenario: Aerating compacted soil and overseeding a thin lawn to improve health and density.

samplePhrase.en: Aerate first, then apply seed and topdressing in one pass.
samplePhrase.es: Airea primero, luego aplica semilla y cobertura superficial en un paso.

landscaper.title: Hardscape Patio Installation
landscaper.scenario: Building a paver or stone patio with proper base preparation and drainage.

samplePhrase.en: Compact the base material to four inches before laying the sand bed.
samplePhrase.es: Compacta el material de base a cuatro pulgadas antes de colocar la capa de arena.

landscaper.title: Fertilizer Troubleshooting and Adjustments
landscaper.scenario: Assessing lawn health issues and adjusting fertilizer regimens based on soil test results.

samplePhrase.en: The soil is too acidic; we need to apply lime to raise the pH.
samplePhrase.es: El suelo es demasiado ácido; necesitamos aplicar cal para elevar el pH.

landscaper.title: Irrigation System Maintenance and Repair
landscaper.scenario: Inspecting, adjusting, and troubleshooting an existing irrigation system for efficiency.

samplePhrase.en: This sprinkler head is clogged; we need to clean or replace it.
samplePhrase.es: Este cabezal de aspersor está obstruido; necesitamos limpiarlo o reemplazarlo.

landscaper.title: Seasonal Landscape Maintenance
landscaper.scenario: Performing seasonal tasks including spring cleanup, summer maintenance, fall prep, and winter care.

samplePhrase.en: In spring, we'll remove the winter mulch and rake out the dead leaves.
samplePhrase.es: En primavera, quitaremos el mantillo de invierno y rastrillamos las hojas muertas.

landscaper.title: Client Communication and Project Updates
landscaper.scenario: Providing regular updates to clients about project progress, challenges, and next steps.

samplePhrase.en: We're on schedule and the planting will be complete by Friday.
samplePhrase.es: Estamos dentro del cronograma y la plantación estará completa el viernes.

auto-mechanic.title: Engine Diagnostics Basics
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician uses a diagnostic scanner to read engine trouble codes from a customer's vehicle.

samplePhrase.en: The scanner shows a P0300 code.
samplePhrase.es: El escáner muestra un código P0300.

auto-mechanic.title: Oil Change Service
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic drains old oil, replaces the filter, and refills the engine with fresh oil.

samplePhrase.en: Check the oil level with the dipstick.
samplePhrase.es: Revisa el nivel de aceite con la varilla medidora.

auto-mechanic.title: Brake Pad Inspection
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician removes the wheel and inspects brake pads for wear and thickness.

samplePhrase.en: The brake pads are worn down to 2 millimeters.
samplePhrase.es: Las pastillas de freno están desgastadas a 2 milímetros.

auto-mechanic.title: Transmission Fluid Check
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic checks the transmission fluid level and condition using the transmission dipstick.

samplePhrase.en: The transmission fluid smells burnt and is dark red.
samplePhrase.es: El líquido de la transmisión huele a quemado y es rojo oscuro.

auto-mechanic.title: Spark Plug Replacement
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician removes old spark plugs and installs new ones in the engine cylinder head.

samplePhrase.en: Install new spark plugs with a 0.035 inch gap.
samplePhrase.es: Instala bujías nuevas con una separación de 0.035 pulgadas.

auto-mechanic.title: Battery Testing and Replacement
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic tests the battery with a load tester and replaces it if voltage is low.

samplePhrase.en: The battery is only showing 9 volts—it needs replacement.
samplePhrase.es: La batería solo muestra 9 voltios—necesita reemplazo.

auto-mechanic.title: Air Filter Inspection
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician removes and inspects the engine air filter for dirt and blockage.

samplePhrase.en: This air filter is too dirty and needs to be replaced.
samplePhrase.es: Este filtro de aire está muy sucio y necesita ser reemplazado.

auto-mechanic.title: Fluid Leak Diagnosis
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician inspects under the vehicle to identify where fluid is leaking from.

samplePhrase.en: There is a coolant leak near the water pump.
samplePhrase.es: Hay una fuga de refrigerante cerca de la bomba de agua.

auto-mechanic.title: Customer Estimate Preparation
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic documents repair needs and prepares a written estimate for the customer.

samplePhrase.en: This estimate includes two hours of labor and four brake pads.
samplePhrase.es: Este presupuesto incluye dos horas de mano de obra y cuatro pastillas de freno.

auto-mechanic.title: Parts Ordering Basics
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic calls a parts supplier to order replacement components for a repair job.

samplePhrase.en: Order two OEM spark plugs with part number PQ20R11.
samplePhrase.es: Ordena dos bujías OEM con número de pieza PQ20R11.

auto-mechanic.title: Timing Belt Inspection
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician removes the timing belt cover and inspects the belt for cracks and wear.

samplePhrase.en: The timing belt has visible cracks and should be replaced soon.
samplePhrase.es: La correa de distribución tiene grietas visibles y debe reemplazarse pronto.

auto-mechanic.title: Coolant System Service
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic drains old coolant, flushes the system, and refills it with fresh antifreeze.

samplePhrase.en: The coolant system needs a complete flush and refill.
samplePhrase.es: El sistema de refrigeración necesita un enjuague completo y rellenado.

auto-mechanic.title: Suspension and Alignment Check
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician inspects shocks, struts, and springs, then performs a wheel alignment.

samplePhrase.en: The shocks are worn out and the wheels need alignment.
samplePhrase.es: Los amortiguadores están gastados y las ruedas necesitan alineación.

auto-mechanic.title: Engine Compression Test
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician performs a compression test on each cylinder to check engine health.

samplePhrase.en: Cylinder three has low compression at 90 PSI.
samplePhrase.es: El cilindro tres tiene baja compresión en 90 PSI.

auto-mechanic.title: Electrical System Diagnosis
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician tests the alternator, starter, and wiring to diagnose charging and starting problems.

samplePhrase.en: The alternator is not charging—it outputs zero volts.
samplePhrase.es: El alternador no está cargando—produce cero voltios.

auto-mechanic.title: Engine Diagnostic Scan
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician uses a diagnostic scanner to read engine fault codes from a customer's vehicle.

samplePhrase.en: The scanner shows a P0300 code—that means random misfire detected.
samplePhrase.es: El escáner muestra un código P0300—eso significa falla de encendido aleatoria detectada.

auto-mechanic.title: Oil Change Service
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician drains old oil, replaces the filter, and refills with new synthetic oil.

samplePhrase.en: Check the dipstick to verify the oil level is correct after filling.
samplePhrase.es: Verifica la varilla medidora para confirmar que el nivel de aceite es correcto después de llenar.

auto-mechanic.title: Brake Pad Replacement
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic removes brake calipers, inspects rotors, and installs new brake pads.

samplePhrase.en: The front brake pads are worn down to the metal—we need to replace them now.
samplePhrase.es: Las pastillas de freno delanteras están desgastadas hasta el metal—necesitamos reemplazarlas ahora.

auto-mechanic.title: Transmission Fluid Service
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician drains transmission fluid, changes the filter, and refills with the correct specification.

samplePhrase.en: This automatic transmission needs fresh fluid—check the color and smell first.
samplePhrase.es: Esta transmisión automática necesita fluido nuevo—primero verifica el color y el olor.

auto-mechanic.title: Spark Plug Replacement
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic removes old spark plugs, inspects them for wear, and installs new ones with correct gap.

samplePhrase.en: These spark plugs are fouled—replace all six with the correct gap of 0.035 inches.
samplePhrase.es: Estas bujías están sucias—reemplázalas todas con la separación correcta de 0.035 pulgadas.

auto-mechanic.title: Coolant System Flush
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician drains coolant, flushes the radiator, and refills with the correct coolant type.

samplePhrase.en: The coolant is brown and dirty—let's flush the entire system with distilled water.
samplePhrase.es: El refrigerante está marrón y sucio—vamos a purgar todo el sistema con agua destilada.

auto-mechanic.title: Belt and Hose Inspection
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic inspects serpentine belts, hoses, and clamps for cracks, fraying, and leaks.

samplePhrase.en: The serpentine belt is cracked and needs replacement—also tighten this loose hose clamp.
samplePhrase.es: La correa serpentina está agrietada y necesita reemplazo—también aprieta esta abrazadera de manguera suelta.

auto-mechanic.title: Battery Testing and Replacement
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician tests battery voltage, load capacity, and terminal corrosion before recommending replacement.

samplePhrase.en: The battery is five years old and failing the load test—replace it with a 600 CCA battery.
samplePhrase.es: La batería tiene cinco años y falla la prueba de carga—reemplázala con una batería de 600 CCA.

auto-mechanic.title: Air Filter and Cabin Filter Service
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician removes clogged engine and cabin air filters and installs new high-efficiency filters.

samplePhrase.en: Both the engine and cabin air filters are completely clogged—install new ones for better airflow.
samplePhrase.es: Tanto el filtro de aire del motor como el de la cabina están completamente obstruidos—instala otros nuevos para mejor flujo de aire.

auto-mechanic.title: Engine Valve Cover Gasket Leak
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic removes the valve cover, cleans the gasket surface, and installs a new gasket to stop oil leaks.

samplePhrase.en: The valve cover gasket is leaking oil—remove the cover, clean it, and seal with a new gasket.
samplePhrase.es: La junta de la tapa de válvulas está filtrando aceite—retira la tapa, límpiala y sella con una junta nueva.

auto-mechanic.title: Customer Estimate Preparation
auto-mechanic.scenario: A service advisor documents customer vehicle issues and prepares a written repair estimate with labor and parts costs.

samplePhrase.en: I'll prepare an estimate for the brake service, which includes new pads, rotors, and fluid flush.
samplePhrase.es: Prepararé un presupuesto para el servicio de frenos, que incluye pastillas nuevas, rotores y purga de fluido.

auto-mechanic.title: Parts Ordering System
auto-mechanic.scenario: A parts manager uses the computer system to order replacement parts from suppliers and track inventory.

samplePhrase.en: Order part number 4567-AB from our main supplier—it's in stock and arrives tomorrow.
samplePhrase.es: Ordena el número de pieza 4567-AB de nuestro proveedor principal—está en stock y llega mañana.

auto-mechanic.title: Transmission Problem Diagnosis
auto-mechanic.scenario: A technician test-drives a vehicle, checks transmission fluid condition, and runs computer diagnostics for shifting issues.

samplePhrase.en: The transmission is slipping between second and third gear—the fluid is burnt and needs service.
samplePhrase.es: La transmisión está patinando entre segunda y tercera marcha—el fluido está quemado y necesita servicio.

auto-mechanic.title: Engine Overheating Investigation
auto-mechanic.scenario: A mechanic diagnoses an overheating engine by checking coolant level, thermostat function, and radiator condition.

samplePhrase.en: The engine is overheating because the thermostat is stuck closed—replace it immediately.
samplePhrase.es: El motor se está sobrecalentando porque el termostato está atascado cerrado—reemplázalo inmediatamente.

auto-mechanic.title: Complex Engine Repair Planning
auto-mechanic.scenario: A lead technician plans a major engine repair involving timing belt replacement, valve adjustment, and gasket replacement with detailed steps and timeline.

samplePhrase.en: This timing belt replacement also requires valve adjustment and three gasket replacements—plan 12 hours for the complete job.
samplePhrase.es: Este reemplazo de correa de distribución también requiere ajuste de válvulas y reemplazo de tres juntas—planifica 12 horas para el trabajo completo.
